item.title: Using Hugo
item.description: I’m giving the blogging thing another try and this time I will be using a static site generator, specifically Hugo. I like that it’s written in Go for performance and is otherwise pretty easy to use.

item.title: About /dev/klog
item.description: My name is Jean-François Roy. I’m an architect at Nvidia’s GeForce NOW game streaming service, and was one of the lead graphics infrastructure engineer on Stadia (🪦). I go by “JF”.

item.title: Resume
item.description: I am a self-motivated software engineer specialized in platform engineering and distributed systems, with a history in graphics developer tools and mobile apps. Experience Principal Platform Architect at Nvidia GeForce NOW. 2021 – now Working at Nvidia as an architect on the GeForce NOW game streaming service, with a focus on Linux and GFN’s internal cloud infrastructure. Staff software engineer at Google, LLC. 2013 – 2021 Worked on Stadia. Designed and implemented the graphics infrastructure, including drivers, tools, APIs, monitoring, testing.
